_comment: Single source of truth for acknowledgements data. Update this file, then sync README.md and website/index.html.

dependencies.name: ink
dependencies.desc: React renderer for interactive command-line apps — powers the asm TUI

dependencies.name: @inkjs/ui
dependencies.desc: Prebuilt ink components (inputs, spinners, lists) used across the TUI views

dependencies.name: react
dependencies.desc: UI library backing the ink TUI components and the web catalog

dependencies.name: react-dom
dependencies.desc: React DOM renderer for the browser-based skill catalog

dependencies.name: react-window
dependencies.desc: Windowed list virtualization for the browser-based skill catalog

dependencies.name: yaml
dependencies.desc: JavaScript parser and stringifier for YAML — used to parse SKILL.md frontmatter
